nodes.title: Honors
nodes.description: College honors thesis or other department/program honors, under the supervision of a faculty member. Offered at department discretion.

nodes.title: Reading & Translating Japanese
nodes.description: See Schedule of Courses for specific titles.
nodes.other_requirements: PACE students by permission and override

nodes.title: Reading & Translating Japanese
nodes.description: See Schedule of Courses for specific titles.

nodes.title: IS:JapanPolitics & Translation
nodes.description: A course which is tailored to fit the interests of a specific student, which occurs outside the traditional classroom/laboratory setting under the supervision of a faculty member, for which credit is awarded. Offered at department discretion.

nodes.title: Elementary Japanese I
nodes.description: Introduction to spoken and written Japanese through aural-oral drills and grammar presentation. The three writing systems of Japanese (hiragana, katakana, and kanji) are introduced. No prior knowledge expected.

nodes.title: Intermediate Japanese I
nodes.description: Continuation of JAPN 1200 designed to enable the students to converse in everyday Japanese and to read and write basic texts. Prerequisite: JAPN 1200 or equivalent.

nodes.title: Elementary Japanese II
nodes.description: Continuation of JAPN 1100. Prerequisite: JAPN 1100 or equivalent.

nodes.title: Intermediate Japanese II
nodes.description: Continuation of JAPN 2100. Prerequisite: JAPN 2100 or equivalent.
nodes.other_requirements: instructor permission; Hybrid course; The fourth hour is asynchronous study; PACE students with permission and override

nodes.title: Advanced Japanese II
nodes.description: Continuation of JAPN 3100. Prerequisite: JAPN 3100 or equivalent.
nodes.other_requirements: instructor permission, PACE students with permission and override

nodes.title: Advanced Japanese I
nodes.description: Further development of oral proficiency and advanced study of grammatical structure of modern Japanese, supplemented by audiovisual materials and authentic written texts of several kinds. Prerequisite: JAPN 2200 or equivalent.
nodes.other_requirements: instructor permission and prereq override, PACE students by permission and override
